name: Tomato and Pepper Relish with Moroccan Lemons
recipeInstructions:
- quarters, chopped
1. Place bell peppers in a 9-10"-wide pan; broil 4 inches from heat, turning as needed, until charred on all sides, 15-20 minutes.
2. Cool the peppers and remove the peel, stems, and seeds. Chop them.
3. Drain the tomatoes, reserving the juice for another use. Coarsely chop the tomatoes and drain well.
4. In a bowl, mix the bell peppers, chopped tomatoes, pressed garlic, olive oil, ground cumin, paprika, and pepper.
5. Add the preserved lemons to taste.
6. Serve immediately or cover and chill up to one day. Makes about 2 1/2 cups relish.
